text:
Created attachment 161226
phplist patch

There is a new release of mail/phplist. So there is a patch for this. I've added DOCS options. I've made a poudriere testports. Log files can be found at:

https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2015-09-21_13h09m11s/logs/phplist-3.2.0.log (DOCS=on)

https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2015-09-21_13h10m27s/logs/phplist-3.2.0.log (DOCS=off)
